footer.tagline: A premium institute dedicated to SAP Finance training and digital transformation — serving professionals, finance leaders and enterprises.
footer.disclaimer: Registration of the activity declaration does not constitute State accreditation.

home.title_a: Train, transform and embed adoption across
home.lede: We train SAP professionals, support finance leaders through their S/4HANA transformations and prepare Key Users to secure every deployment.
home.positioning_title_a: Three areas of expertise, one focus:
home.positioning_lede: We work exclusively in SAP Finance. Across every transformation and every upskilling program, we connect business processes, SAP configuration and team adoption — to deliver projects that hold up over time.
home.pillar_1_text: Structured programs for consultants, experts and finance professionals seeking to master FICO, S/4HANA and end-to-end processes.
home.pillar_2_text: Scoping, business–IT alignment and advisory support for finance leaders engaged in a migration or core SAP redesign.
home.pillar_3_text: Preparation of key users, knowledge transfer and go-live readiness to anchor new processes for the long term.
home.offer_1_text: Designed for consultants, experts and finance professionals targeting deeper command of FICO, S/4HANA or a specific domain — for skills that translate directly into project delivery.
home.offer_2_text: Built for finance and IT leaders driving an S/4HANA transformation. Scoping, process–configuration alignment and change management — for a structured project, free of blind spots.
home.offer_3_text: Prepare your key users for go-live and secure adoption. Tailored programs, dedicated materials and team autonomy — for a controlled, durable rollout.
home.why_text: Our programs and engagements are built on a single conviction: real expertise is only transferred from the field — from real cases and a fine-grained mastery of processes. No abstract theory, no generic playbooks.
home.why_2: Real cases drawn from live projects
home.audience_title: Built for SAP professionals and leaders driving transformation.
home.aud_1_desc: To strengthen your operational command of FICO and S/4HANA.
home.aud_2_desc: To structure your trajectory and grow into senior positions.
home.aud_3_desc: To gain full autonomy before and after go-live.
home.aud_4_desc: To steer an S/4HANA transformation without disruption.
home.aud_5_desc: To align business, configuration and adoption.
home.aud_6_desc: To frame the redesign of your core SAP Finance landscape.
home.corp_title: Two packs to structure your SAP Finance programs.
home.corp_lede: Whether you are launching an S/4HANA transformation or preparing a go-live, our two enterprise packs cover the full cycle: scoping, deployment, adoption and team autonomy.
home.corp_p1_text: Scoping, business–configuration alignment and project advisory for finance and IT leaders engaged in an S/4HANA migration or redesign.
home.corp_p2_text: Preparation of business relays, knowledge transfer and deployment security to embed adoption from day one of go-live.
home.digital_title: Tools, frameworks and advanced content for your SAP Finance teams.
home.digital_lede: Playbooks, PDF guides and templates drawn from our field engagements — high-value resources to structure a project, accelerate a training program or equip a SAP Finance team.
home.refs_lede: Our experts have contributed to SAP Finance programs within leading French and international groups, in demanding contexts with high-stakes outcomes.
home.refs_disclaimer: These references illustrate the experience of our experts within major groups; they do not imply a direct commercial relationship or formal endorsement.
home.final_title: Let's discuss your SAP Finance project.
home.final_lede: Whether you are looking for a training program, a project scoping or Key User support, we respond within 24–48 h with a concrete first read of your needs.
